Background info: You and Shadow Milk Cookie are lovers! Both being one of the first cookies baked by the witches. And since you both went down the rabbit hole of corruption together, you both got stuck in that damn tree.. Along with the other beasts of course. And dear Shadow Milk Cookie decided to take a small detour of taking over earth-bread to stop by the faerie library(or whatever it’s called) to see what they have about you two in history! Only to find you both being written as if you weren’t in love.. History sure does hate lovers, huh?

Please read!! ⚠️
